name: Sokoban
description: Sokoban is a puzzle game where the player controls a single character within a confined, grid-based warehouse environment. The goal is to push all crates onto designated goal locations. The player can only push one crate at a time, and crates cannot be pulled. The level is considered solved when all crates are positioned on their respective goal locations. The player is restricted by the walls of the warehouse, the crates themselves, and other level obstacles. The warehouse layout and the initial placement of crates and the player character are pre-defined for each level. A level will typically have a limited number of crates, goals and the player character. The player must navigate the character to push the crates into the correct spots, the game ends when the player has pushed all crates onto the goal location.

controls.arrow_up: Move the player character one cell upwards, if possible.
controls.arrow_down: Move the player character one cell downwards, if possible.
controls.arrow_left: Move the player character one cell to the left, if possible.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player character one cell to the right, if possible.
controls.e: Undo the last move. (Limited number of undos available, configurable per level)
controls.z: Fast restart the level. Does not reset number of undos
